items.title: What we know so far about the US fighter jet shot down over Iran
items.summary: The pilot of the downed jet has been safely rescued, but a search and rescue operation is still under way for the jet's second crew member, US media reports.

items.title: UN watchdog voices 'deep concern' as Iran reports new attacks on nuclear plant
items.summary: The International Atomic Energy Agency urges restraint to avoid a nuclear accident at Iran's Bushehr plant.

items.title: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
items.summary: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 已故伊朗將領蘇雷曼尼親屬美國被捕　綠卡遭撤銷

items.title: 伊朗布什爾核電廠又遭襲1員工死於彈片 俄企再撤198人
items.summary: 數家俄羅斯通訊社報導，俄羅斯國營核子企業（Rosatom）今天依原定計畫從伊朗的布什爾（Bushehr）核電廠再撤離198名員工。這座電廠今天傳出1名職員遭射彈碎片擊中身亡。  路透社報...…

items.title: 酸爆川普「天才」！伊朗議長：戰爭從政權更換 變「幫找美飛官」
items.summary: 伊朗國會議長卡利巴夫（Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf）昨（3日）發文，開酸美國總統川普是「天才」，他嘲笑川普雖然嘴上說美軍「一直贏」，實際上戰爭目標卻已經從「更換伊...…
